title: better crosshair by rinat
description: This mod allow you to customize your crosshair
body:
# Description

This mod lets you customize your crosshair’s appearance, behavior, and position—so you can improve visibility, express your style, or just make aiming more fun.
Open Settings (click the mod in Mod Menu) to personalize your crosshair exactly how you want it.

## Latest Update
- added ability to change color then you can attack entity

## Why You’ll Love It
- Better visibility — Choose vibrant colors or a rainbow effect to stand out against any 
  
- Optimize your aim — Tweak size, gap, width, and rotation for precision targeting.

- Express yourself — Use spinning crosshairs, fun shapes, or even items as your cursor for a playful twist.

## Important Notes
 - Requires: [Fabric Api](modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Cloth Config Api](modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [Mod Menu](modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
 - Incompatible with: [Vulkan Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)
 - Supported Versions: 1.21 - 1.21.5 with fabric

![how you can transform your crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/311d829d6503c6bf9b02af4b399187b41a66758d_0.webp)


## Features

### Features
General
- Enable – Toggle the mod on or off.

### Colors
- Crosshair Color – Set the crosshair color.
- Use Rainbow – Enable or disable the rainbow effect.
  - Rainbow Speed – Adjust how fast the rainbow colors change.

### Sizes

- Use Attack Indicator – Show or hide the vanilla attack indicator.

- Distance from Center to Attack Indicator – Adjust spacing between the crosshair and the attack indicator.

- Crosshair Size – Change the line length.

- Crosshair Gap – Change the gap between the center and crosshair lines.

- Crosshair Width – Change line thickness.

- Crosshair Rotation – Rotate the crosshair (recommended: 0–45 degrees).

- Use Different Color Then Can Attack Enemy - everything explained in the name

- Crosshair Color If Can Attack Enemy - once again everything explained in the name
- 
### Dot Settings

- Enable Dot – Show or hide the center dot.

- Dot Size – Adjust the dot size.

- Dot Color – Set the dot color.

### Fun

- Use Cross as Crosshair – Use a plus-shaped crosshair instead of the item crosshair.

- Spin Crosshair – Make the crosshair spin (works with both Cross and Item crosshairs).

- Use Item as Crosshair – Display an item as your crosshair.

- Choose Item as Crosshair – Select which item to use as the crosshair.

- To get the item ID, press F3 + H, then hover over the item in your inventory. Example: ```minecraft:baked_potato```.
